'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=hyw7GOrlDPqzS6kWcpfkipYbeUDVjqXz0NkoesyYoq8-1772824776-1.0.1.1-NipWbOM0N4m7zLoIr5ZRT.7QF1AHI6m0YoBjwKG7u2g"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
